prompt: A stylized ANIMATED-FILM city landscape of London — NOT photorealistic. Painterly semi-3D animation look, like a high-end animated movie matte painting / Pixar-Disney background art: soft volumetric light, gentle hand-painted brush texture, clean charming shapes, smooth color gradients, rich atmospheric depth. HERO ELEMENT: a sleek low-slung papaya-orange McLaren supercar (recognizable McLaren silhouette — long teardrop cabin, dihedral doors, aggressive aero, glossy McLaren papaya-orange paint) driving across Westminster Bridge in the foreground, motion and glamour. Behind it: the River Thames at twilight with Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament, the London Eye, Tower Bridge in the distance, a classic red double-decker bus, soft city lights glowing. Color palette: deep berry purple, blackberry and raspberry magenta tones across the sky and water, lit by a vivid papaya-orange sunset glow that echoes the car, warm amber reflections on the Thames — sleek modern luxury supercar mood, high-energy but elegant. Wide cinematic 16:9 composition, glossy refined finish. Absolutely NO text, NO words, NO written logos, NO badges, NO frames or borders — just clean illustrated scenery filling the entire frame.
